statement: In every magma, Equation 3225 (`x = (((y * z) * z) * w) * w`) implies Equation 2954 (`x = ((y * (y * y)) * z) * z`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0273
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) z) w) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op y y)) z) z)
